description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsBlack striped brassiere which is of a moulded non wired variety for better comfort and soft feel against the skin, has adjustable straps, a single hook and eye clasp which is adjustable to Fit your body type at the back and double layered and seamless cups to give a smooth look under tight fitting garmentsMaterial and Care48% nylon, 39% polyester and 13% spandexHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
